title: Section 6
content: In the case of a minor 1 ***, nothing in this Act shall be construed to take away or derogate from any power to appoint a guardian of his person or property, or both, which is valid by the law to which the minor is subject.
footnote: 1. The words who is not an European British subject omitted by Act 3 of 1951, s. 3 and the Schedule.
